completed_tasks.name: 01-03 UI views wired to install pipeline

blockers.description: Root cause identified: borealis task loop pthread crashes on startup in NRO-under-hbloader context. Fix applied: USE_STD_THREAD=ON in Makefile + Dockerfile. Needs Docker rebuild and hardware re-test.
blockers.workaround: Build with docker (make docker) then deploy and test

human_actions_pending.action: Run 'make docker' to rebuild with USE_STD_THREAD=ON, copy dist/SwitchPalace.nro to Switch, and launch
human_actions_pending.context: Fix changes borealis task loop thread from pthread_create (crashes in NRO context) to std::thread (properly initializes C++ runtime for new thread). If crash persists, also remove __nx_applet_type = AppletType_Default from source/main.cpp.

decisions.rationale: borealis status bar calls nifm every frame; uninitialized = IPC abort
GLFW glfwInit fails in applet mode on fw 21.1.0
Safe ceiling for both applet and application mode

Root cause of instruction abort crash: borealis pthread task loop crashes at startup in NRO-under-hbloader context due to missing C++ runtime init. std::thread properly initializes runtime state for the new thread.

decisions.decision: Crash was at .rodata ELF offset 0x1f5148 with base 0x3282800000, confirmed via maxwell::CmdList::moveTo symbol match at 0x13d240
decisions.rationale: Instruction abort = CPU jumped to non-executable .rodata. Caused by corrupted function state in pthread created without proper C++ thread init.

next_action: Run 'make docker' to rebuild. Deploy dist/SwitchPalace.nro to Switch. Launch and check if crash is resolved. If crash persists, remove __nx_applet_type = AppletType_Default from source/main.cpp as secondary fix.
context_notes: Crash diagnosis used addr2line on build/SwitchPalace.elf. NRO load base confirmed as 0x3282800000 via maxwell::CmdList::moveTo at ELF offset 0x13d240. Crash PC at ELF 0x1f5148 is in .rodata (non-executable). The borealis task loop thread (pthread, 132KB stack, Thread 01 in crash report) crashes due to C++ runtime not being properly initialized for the new thread in the NRO context. Three crash runs showed non-deterministic timing (runs 1&2 crashed before 'cleanup:', run 3 crashed at 'titleBar added') consistent with a background thread crashing asynchronously. Debug logging (debugLog/fbDebugLog) is still in source/main.cpp and source/ui/file_browser.cpp -- remove before final hw-verify pass.
